papers_mined.title: Marshall Islands stick chart Wikipedia
papers_mined.note: Stick charts represent ocean swell patterns + island disruption; types rebbelib (whole chains) + meddo (smaller area) + mattang (teaching tool); 4 ocean swells rilib/kaelib/bungdockerik/bundockeing.

papers_mined.title: Smarthistory Navigation Chart Marshall Islands
papers_mined.note: Coconut frond midribs framework; shells mark islands; charts memorized BEFORE voyage, never consulted DURING — wayfinding by canoe-felt-swell only.

papers_mined.title: Sculptural Cartography Marshall Islands
papers_mined.note: Sculptural map of wave-propagation patterns + reflected/refracted swell intersections; teaching tool mattang for novices.

papers_mined.title: Traditional Navigation Marshall Islands
papers_mined.note: Wayfinder lies prone in canoe to feel pitch/roll from underlying swells; rilib backbone swells from NE trade winds present year-round.
